hooks.command: echo '## Memex Memory System Active' && echo 'You have a Zettelkasten memory. When the user gives you a task, check if any cards below are relevant. If so, run `memex read <slug>` to get full context before starting.' && echo '' && memex read index 2>/dev/null || echo 'No memex index yet. Run /memex-organize to create one.'
